aboutMe.title: Automator of Things
aboutMe.body: I am an Automator of Things.  I can automate business processes

posts.title: Declarative DevOps Microframeworks
posts.name: Chris Kuech
posts.description: Declarative DevOps Microframeworks is the most robust, portable, and scalable pattern for managing your DevOps systems with less code. This series will help you understand the concepts behind Declarative DevOps Microframeworks, then walk you through implementing some common use cases in the most DevOps-friendly language: PowerShell.

posts.title: Functional Programming in PowerShell
posts.name: Chris Kuech
posts.description: Classes are associated with Object-Oriented Programming and rarely associated with Functional Programming. This guide shows you how to leverage PowerShell classes while keeping your code functional.
